{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231640037CFD16F59F16985188D2"}"},"total":4824},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7217170064078799674","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看完了，前期脚踏实地一步一步发展，中期稍微压了一下主角成长，但也不算压的太狠，还是挺好的，就是后期节奏突然加快了不少，有点心急了，作者可以慢慢写的。总之，以我在番茄看了那么多书里面，算是西游文里难得一见的好书了。加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680378971,"group_id":"7118747886774389794","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"洗尽铅华，归来仍是少年！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5D7hgxdsUi0tmZKhPZYj2g=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cb256bd5d2a34b5484d6d4e1f2d6c645~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792017&x-signature=FKBifJMA4ePLxSKJQCt4jdVX3DU%3D","user_id":"518562634010871","user_name":"格兰岛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"518562634010871","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742256548,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7118747886774389794","book_info":{"abstract":"【西游+封神+洪荒+模拟器】孙袁穿越西游世界，在花果山等到孙悟空出生，绑定西游模拟器，从此在开挂的路上一去不复返。
【三岁，你又来眺望那块仙石，仙石炸裂，灵明石猴出世，你成为他认识的第一只猴子。】
【十岁，你跟随石猴一起出海寻长生，六丁神将卷起海浪，将你打下水，石猴救援不得，你死了。】
【三岁，你离开花果山，没有了冥冥中的注视，你感觉浑身轻松。】
【四岁，你被妖师宫统领带到妖师宫，你开始接触周天星斗大阵。】
【十六岁，天庭攻打妖师宫，你见到了鲲鹏神威盖世。】
【十七岁，你得到了上古魔猿血脉。】
【十八岁，你得到妖皇认可，得到上古妖庭大神通，妖神变。】
【五百一十二岁，你成为太乙金仙。】
【八百岁，你成为大罗金仙，你得到了盘古血脉。】
【八百七十八岁，孙悟空骗唐僧揭开佛偈，三闹天宫，为你复仇。】
【……】
“哎呀，不知不觉，成圣了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05a2e2ba39371b80713c3a05761c010b","author":"画画的榴莲","author_id":"","book_id":"7118747886774389794","book_name":"西游还没开始，我就成圣了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#98a8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7118754350255735336","read_count":"18095","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1117089"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"488","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,架空,东方玄幻,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ffb513bebfb6b22c5cd2372e9619f184~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439204&x-signature=bx1qroeiIOYZPsGsIxaU14bSr%2B4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111525731299","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.5688448e
